name: Banana Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in the bread machine.
2. Add oil, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla to the bread machine.
3. Insert the pan securely into the machine.
4. Close the lid and select "CAKE" setting.
5. Press "START."
6. When a beep sounds (after about 5 minutes), add mashed banana and chopped pecans to the bread machine.
7. Press "START" again.
8. The "COMPLETE" light will flash when the cake is done.
This recipe is from the Zojirushi book for the 1 1/2 pound vertical machine.
